Template.SubjectPart: Action Required: IT Setup & Access Provisioning

Hi {{name}},

Your IT accounts and access are being set up. Please complete the required steps here: {{portal_link}}
Template.HtmlPart:
Action Required: IT Setup & Access

Dear {{name}},

As part of your onboarding process, we are setting up your IT accounts, devices, and system access. Please complete the steps in your onboarding portal to confirm your setup preferences.

Required Action:

Please access your onboarding portal to confirm your IT setup details, including device preferences and required software.

Your corporate email, system credentials, and tool access will be activated once this step is complete.

Complete IT Setup

Important: Completion of IT provisioning is required before you can proceed to the next phase of your onboarding.

If you face any issues accessing the portal or have questions about your IT setup, please reach out to our IT support team.

Thank you for your cooperation.

IT Support Team

IT Department | Access & Provisioning
